implementationSummary: Completed issue #414 wave-2 (#414-B): navigation compositions (isNavTabActive, PageHeader, PrimaryNavigation active-route refinement), Recharts chart primitives with theme CSS variable series colors, keyboard-operable ChartExpandableTile, screen-reader text equivalents, append-only barrel/MODULE/import-boundary coverage for all #414 compositions including #414-A toast/loaders.
assumptions: PageHeader shop metadata takes precedence over subtitle per navigation.md header guidance.
MetricSparkline and area/line chart visuals remain aria-hidden; ChartTextEquivalent carries the accessible value.
ChartExpandableTile Enter/Space handling mirrors button activation without duplicating chart interaction inside SVG.
risks: recharts@2.15.4 is deprecated upstream; migration to v3 is a future chore outside #414 scope.
pnpm-lock.yaml updated for recharts and @types/lodash — merge carefully with parallel #413 worktree.
